## Description

Please include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed. Include relevant motivation and context.

**Module:**
- [ ] M1 — Auth & User Management
- [ ] M2 — Vehicle Management
- [ ] M3 — Workshop Management + Location
- [ ] M4 — Appointment Booking
- [ ] M5 — Service Records
- [ ] M6 — Ratings, Reviews & Image Upload
- [ ] Infrastructure / Config

## Type of change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update

## Checklist:

- [ ] My code follows the code conventions of this project (`CLAUDE.md`)
- [ ] I have updated the `TASK.md` board with my progress
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or unhandled errors
- [ ] (Backend) I have added/updated validation (express-validator) for my new routes
- [ ] (Mobile) I have tested my changes visually on an emulator or physical device

## How Has This Been Tested?

Please describe the tests that you ran to verify your changes. Provide instructions so we can reproduce.

- [ ] Expo Go App Flow (Mobile testing)
